description:
Automatic Windows HDR Switching For Any Application.

PyAutoActions automates HDR management for your games and applications, enabling and disabling HDR based on the process status.
Changes:
- Added Suspend/Resume Process features to pause games/apps directly from gui right click context menu.
- Added End Task feature in gui right click context menu.
- Added some safety measures.
- General bug fixes.
Notice:
- When suspending a game/app it's window will be minimized automatically and will be shown again after clicking Resume process.
- While a process is suspended cpu utilization will be much lower than simply keeping the game/process running in the background.
